title: EggMaster
description:
The one who possesses the Dragon Egg can use it's great powers.

Adds some effects, and 1 special ability - Dragon Beam
body:
Do you find it boring to just get a dragon egg that doesn't give anything? Or do you want you and your friends to _**REALLY**_ have something to fight for? Then this plugin is for you. It adds special effects when the egg is spawned, as well as powerful effects to the one who has it in their inventory (you can't get any other effects tho).

Furthermore, the Egg Master can use a special ability - Dragon Beam (you need to take the egg in your right or left hand and press SHIFT). Also, the plugin is fully customizable through config.

Good luck, and have fun!

And btw, if you want to use it anywhere, pls contact me first
